name: brevo
description: Reads and writes Brevo (formerly Sendinblue) contacts, email campaigns, contact lists, segments, senders, sender domains, CRM companies/deals, and webhooks through the Brevo REST API.

risk.read: external Brevo API read of contact, campaign, CRM, and sender data
risk.write: external mutation of contacts, contact lists, senders, CRM companies/deals, and webhooks; webhook writes register live event delivery to a caller-chosen URL
risk.approval: required for all write actions; each action's per-record risk string in writes.json is the authoritative summary
